rationale: One-time exact-amount approval of 50 USDT to Mento router 0x4861840c2efb2b98312b0ae34d86fd73e8f9b6f6 so the 10 treasury conversion tranches don't each need their own approval tx.

Treasury setup tranche 1/10: convert 5 USDT to cUSD(USDm), the swarm base currency, via Mento. Tranche-sized to respect the $5 per-tx cap. Gas paid in USDT via CIP-64 fee adapter (wallet holds no CELO).

Seed agent-1 with 1 cUSD for the Phase 1 fee-abstraction smoke test. Gas paid in cUSD.

Phase 1 smoke test: transfer $0.01 cUSD(USDm) agent-1 → orchestrator with CIP-64 feeCurrency=USDm, proving agents pay gas in the stablecoin they hold and never touch CELO (native balance after tx: 0 CELO).
One-time max approval of USDm to the Aave v3 Pool so future supplies don't each need an approval tx (batched per CLAUDE.md §8).
fork test: supply $2 cUSD to Aave v3
fork test: rotate $1 cUSD into USDT
Unwind (fork-test cull): withdraw full USDm position from Aave v3 so the balance can return to the treasury.
Unwind (fork-test cull): convert 1.00062 USDT to cUSD before returning funds to the treasury.

Unwind (fork-test cull): return 5.988631574243450766 cUSD to the treasury 0xC0296012Cfbb0e6DF5dA7158B65Dbc46DD9650e0 the agent was funded from. Gas paid from the same cUSD; only dust (<$0.01) remains in the retired wallet.
One-time max approval of USDm to the Aave v3 Pool so future supplies don't each need an approval tx (batched per CLAUDE.md §8).
Phase 2 smoke test: supply $2 cUSD to Aave v3 Celo (live APY 2.472%) to prove the yield adapter on mainnet before the swarm uses it. Gas paid in cUSD via CIP-64.
Phase 2 smoke test: withdraw the full $2 aUSDm position to prove round-trip works. Gas paid in cUSD via CIP-64.
